description: Mr. Zhang returns to the showroom and learns about materials, colors, and sizes before choosing a sofa.
visual_style: See style-guide.md for full consistency rules

scenes.description: Mr. Zhang comes back to look at sofas.

lines.speaker: Li Wei
lines.en: Welcome back, Mr. Zhang. What would you like to see today?
lines.zh: 欢迎再次光临，张先生。今天想看些什么？

lines.speaker: Mr. Zhang
lines.en: I'd like to see some sofas. What materials do you have?
lines.zh: 我想看看沙发。你们有什么材质的？

lines.speaker: Li Wei
lines.en: We have fabric, leather, genuine leather and solid wood frames.
lines.zh: 我们有布艺、皮革、真皮和实木框架的。

scenes.description: Li Wei explains the differences between materials.

lines.speaker: Mr. Zhang
lines.en: What is this sofa made of?
lines.zh: 这个沙发是什么材质的？

lines.speaker: Li Wei
lines.en: It's made of real leather, so it's very durable.
lines.zh: 这是用真皮做的，所以非常耐用。

lines.speaker: Mr. Zhang
lines.en: Do you have fabric sofas too?
lines.zh: 你们也有布艺沙发吗？

lines.speaker: Li Wei
lines.en: Yes. This fabric sofa is soft and easy to clean.
lines.zh: 有的。这款布艺沙发柔软且容易清洁。

scenes.description: They look at color swatches for the sofa.

lines.speaker: Li Wei
lines.en: How many colors do you have for this design?
lines.zh: 这款设计有多少种颜色？

lines.speaker: Mr. Zhang
lines.en: We have red, white, black, brown and beige.
lines.zh: 我们有红色、白色、黑色、棕色和米色。

lines.speaker: Li Wei
lines.en: I like the brown one. Can you customize the color?
lines.zh: 我喜欢棕色的。可以定制颜色吗？

lines.speaker: Mr. Zhang
lines.en: Of course. We can make it in light brown if you prefer.
lines.zh: 当然可以。如果您喜欢，我们可以做成浅棕色。

scenes.description: Mr. Zhang asks about the sofa dimensions.

lines.speaker: Mr. Zhang
lines.en: Can you tell me the size of this sofa?
lines.zh: 能告诉我这个沙发的尺寸吗？

lines.speaker: Li Wei
lines.en: This three-seater is 2.2 meters long, 95 centimeters deep and 85 centimeters high.
lines.zh: 这款三人沙发长2.2米，深95厘米，高85厘米。

lines.speaker: Mr. Zhang
lines.en: Do you have a bigger size?
lines.zh: 你们有更大的尺寸吗？

lines.speaker: Li Wei
lines.en: Yes, we also have a king-size sofa that is 2.4 meters long.
lines.zh: 有的，我们还有一款特大号沙发，长2.4米。

scenes.description: Mr. Zhang sits on the sofa to test comfort.

lines.speaker: Li Wei
lines.en: Would you like to sit down and try it?
lines.zh: 您要坐下来试试吗？

lines.speaker: Mr. Zhang
lines.en: It's quite comfortable. The cushions are firm but soft.
lines.zh: 相当舒服。靠垫结实又柔软。

lines.speaker: Li Wei
lines.en: This model sells very well because of its design.
lines.zh: 这款因为设计好，卖得很不错。

scenes.description: Mr. Zhang decides on the material and color.

lines.speaker: Mr. Zhang
lines.en: I like the genuine leather sofa in light brown, 2.4 meters.
lines.zh: 我喜欢浅棕色2.4米的真皮沙发。

lines.speaker: Li Wei
lines.en: Great choice. Let me write down the details for you.
lines.zh: 好选择。让我把细节记下来。

lines.speaker: Mr. Zhang
lines.en: Thank you. I'll think about it and come back tomorrow.
lines.zh: 谢谢。我考虑一下，明天再来。
